title: ジャパンCの後に・重なり合う源流

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black finishes the Japan Cup. The fans go
wild and chant her name enthusiastically.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the next race will be the long-awaited
Arima Kinen, where Kitasan Black and Satono
Diamond will once more be reunited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Kitasan Black plowing forward and leading
by example, and Satono Diamond following in her
tracks, the two have managed to reach the
destination they've long dreamed of.
